label: Transparent sea cucumber motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sea cucumber, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single sea cucumber with accurate elongated soft-bodied marine anatomy, leathery sea cucumber texture, small tube-foot details, subtle wrinkled ridges, umber brown body, coral pink highlights, sand beige underside, damp matte surface, calm slow workflow system mood.
Composition/framing: centered complete isolated cutout with generous padding; full body visible from a slightly elevated side profile, do not crop either end or any silhouette detail.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light that preserves tactile texture and natural colors; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no seafloor, no coral landscape, no decorative background, no second animal, no floor plane, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sea Cucumber" derived from the visible transparent sea cucumber motif.
Reference use: The board is the source reference for coding a slow workflow system. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the umber brown leathery body, coral pink nodules, sand beige underside, slow seafloor movement, and tactile tube-foot texture.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source composition, crisp readable text, large labels, no tiny dense tables.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Sea Cucumber, Sea Cucumber Texture, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Slow Workflow Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette labels to show: Sand Drift #F4E6CE, Deep Umber #3B241B, Umber Body #7A4630, Coral Pink #D98273, Tube Foot #C86552, Silt Taupe #B79A7C, Kelp Olive #6E7150, Tide Teal #2C6F73, Abyss Ink #1E2423.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use readable labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, task queue cards, progress charts, burndown line chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, leather texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px radius, calm slow workflow UI, tactile seafloor surfaces, professional component board.
Color palette: use only motif-derived umber brown, coral pink, sand beige, silt taupe, kelp olive, tide teal as restrained support, and abyss ink. Avoid generic purple/blue gradients and unrelated saturated colors.
Text: all visible text must be short, readable, correctly spelled, and not overlapping. Do not use long paragraphs.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Cucumber", no cropped board, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Sea Cucumber design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sea cucumber motif and visible light-mode Morphous Sea Cucumber board as references. Preserve the same palette roles, tactile leathery texture, slow workflow component language, spacing, typography, shadcn/tweakcn coverage, dashboard charts, and table/forms layout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source composition, crisp readable text, large labels, no tiny dense tables.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Sea Cucumber, Sea Cucumber Texture, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Slow Workflow Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette labels to show: Sand Drift #F4E6CE, Deep Umber #3B241B, Umber Body #7A4630, Coral Pink #D98273, Tube Foot #C86552, Silt Taupe #B79A7C, Kelp Olive #6E7150, Tide Teal #2C6F73, Abyss Ink #1E2423.
Visual details: dark background derived from abyss ink and deep umber, readable text from sand drift, primary actions from coral pink and tube-foot coral, charts from tide teal and kelp olive, subtle leather-seafloor texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; readable labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, task queue cards, progress charts, burndown line chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, leather texture samples.
Text: all visible text must be short, readable, correctly spelled, and not overlapping. Do not use long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Cucumber", no illegible microtext.
